authNotes: Web access can retrieve third-party pages and store browser session profiles. Review target site terms and keep profiles scoped.

configuration.summary: web-access reads defaults, ~/.fh-agent/web-access/config.json or FH_WEB_CONFIG, environment variables, and tool parameters.

files.description: Optional JSON config file. fh-agent does not generate it because built-in defaults and environment variables are enough for first use.

usage.summary: Ask the agent to search, fetch, scrape, or operate a browser in natural language; use tool names for exact controls.

runtimePostInstallCommands.description: Install or update the CloakBrowser browser binary after package dependencies are installed.
